sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(m1.id) FROM sys_menu_t m1,sys_menu_t m2 WHERE m1.validflag > 0 AND m2.validflag > 0 AND m1.parentid = m2.id AND m1.parentid > 0
m1.menuname like '%$menuname$%'

SELECT m1.*,m2.menuname AS parentname FROM sys_menu_t m1,sys_menu_t m2 WHERE m1.validflag > 0 AND m2.validflag > 0 AND m1.parentid = m2.id AND m1.parentid > 0
m1.menuname like '%$menuname$%'
ORDER BY m2.orderno,m1.parentid,m1.orderno

SELECT * FROM sys_menu_t WHERE validflag > 0
menuname like '%$menuname$%'
ORDER BY orderno

SELECT m.* FROM sys_menu_t m WHERE m.id IN ( SELECT m2.parentid FROM sys_role_menu_t rm,sys_menu_t m2 WHERE rm.menuid = m2.id AND rm.roleid = $roleid$ AND rm.validflag > 0 AND m2.validflag > 0 GROUP BY m2.parentid ) ORDER BY m.orderno
SELECT m1.*,m2.menuname AS parentname FROM( SELECT * FROM sys_menu_t WHERE id = $id$)m1 LEFT JOIN sys_menu_t m2 ON m1.parentid = m2.id
SELECT * FROM sys_menu_t WHERE parentid = 0 AND validflag > 0 ORDER BY orderno
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO sys_menu_t (menuname,parentid,url,icon,orderno,menutype,validflag,addoperator,addtime,buttons) VALUES ('$menuname$',$parentid$,'$url$','$icon$',$orderno$,$menutype$,1,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$buttons$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE sys_menu_t SET validflag = 0 WHERE id = $id$

UPDATE sys_menu_t SET menuname = '$menuname$',parentid = $parentid$,url = '$url$',orderno = $orderno$,icon='$icon$',addoperator='$addoperator$',addtime='$addtime$', buttons='$buttons$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: SELECT m.*,rm.bn AS bnname,m2.menuname AS parentname FROM sys_role_menu_t rm,sys_menu_t m,sys_menu_t m2 WHERE rm.roleid = $roleid$ AND rm.validflag > 0 AND rm.menuid = m.id AND m.parentid = m2.id ORDER BY m2.orderno
SELECT * FROM sys_menu_t WHERE validflag > 0 AND menutype = 1 ORDER BY orderno

SELECT t.id,t.MENUNAME,t.icon,t.URL,t.buttons FROM sys_menu_t t WHERE t.validflag > 0 and t.ID IN ( SELECT DISTINCT(m.parentid) FROM sys_menu_t m,sys_role_menu_t rm WHERE rm.roleid IN (SELECT r.roleid FROM sys_role_user_t r WHERE r.userid = $userid$ and r.validflag > 0) AND rm.menuid = m.id and rm.validflag > 0 ) order by t.ORDERNO

SELECT m.MENUNAME,m.parentid,m.URL,m.id,rm.buttons FROM sys_menu_t m, sys_role_menu_t rm WHERE rm.menuid = m.id and m.validflag > 0 and rm.validflag > 0 AND m.orderNo>0 AND m.parentid = $parentid$ AND rm.roleid IN (SELECT r.roleid FROM sys_role_user_t r WHERE r.userid = $id$ and r.validflag > 0) GROUP BY m.MENUNAME,m.parentid,m.URL ORDER BY m.ORDERNO
SELECT buttons FROM sys_buttons_t order by id
